creator: mbeis@xs4all.nl
text:
I got this error on FreeBSD yokozuna 11.1-STABLE FreeBSD 11.1-STABLE #0 r328478: Sat Jan 27 22:31:28 CET 2018     root@yokozuna:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/YOKOZUNA  amd64:

...
--- mod_sed.la ---
eval: /usr/local/bin/nm: not found
/usr/bin/ld:.libs/mod_sed.so-ver:2: syntax error in VERSION script
cc: error: linker command failed with exit code 1 (use -v to see invocation)
*** [mod_sed.la] Error code 1

make[6]: stopped in /usr/ports/www/apache24/work/httpd-2.4.33/modules/filters
1 error
...

Maybe this is related or the same?
